prompt: A dynamic anime action illustration in a comedic chibi style, showing a tiny but fierce girl performing a powerful Chinese martial arts shoulder strike, tetsuzankou, into the side of a startled boy. The girl is the main focus: red-haired martial artist girl, with long vivid crimson red hair streaming violently backward, sharp red eyes, and a determined angry expression. She is lunging from right to left at extreme speed, body low and compact, one shoulder and upper back driving into the boy’s torso, one fist pulled back and the other arm tucked for balance, with one knee bent forward and one leg trailing behind. She wears a short red Chinese-style qipao dress with gold floral embroidery, gold trim, side slit, and black flat shoes. The boy is a chibi black-haired teenager in a dark navy Chinese kung fu outfit with gold piping and black shoes, recoiling from the impact with a shocked open mouth, blank white eyes, sweat drops, and his body thrown backward to the left. Emphasize the exact moment of collision with a bright explosive impact burst at his side, flying debris, sparks, and strong speed-line distortion across the entire background. Add dust clouds and ground streaks near the girl’s trailing foot to show explosive forward momentum. Use a manga-inspired composition with exaggerated motion, foreshortening, and a diagonal rush from lower right to upper left. Include 3 large Japanese sound-effect text elements integrated into the art: one vertical right-side callout reading "鉄山靠!!", one smaller vertical annotation beside it reading "てつざんこう", and one large lower-left impact sound effect reading "ドガッ!!". The overall mood is fast, funny, aggressive, and high-impact, with polished modern anime rendering, glossy hair highlights, crisp line art, and dramatic red-white-black contrast.
